## Bugfix PR

## Bug description

- What was broken?
- How could it be reproduced?

## Root cause

- What caused the issue?

## Fix

- What changed to resolve it?

## Validation

- [ ] Reproduced issue before fix
- [ ] Verified behavior after fix
- [ ] `python -m compileall app`
- [ ] Related tests run/updated (if applicable)

## Risk assessment

- Side effects or areas to watch:
